digits : Usa1972P3.DigitSeq n

by
  rw [solution]
  simp only [good_seqs, is_good_seq, unifDistN, PMF.toOuterMeasure, PMF.uniformOfFintype]
  rw [PMF.probability_set_eq_card_div_card]
  · field_simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero]
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_left (by norm_num : 0 < 9 ^ n)]
    have h₁ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // 10 ∣ ∏ a, to_nat_digit (s a)} =
      9 ^ n - 8 ^ n - 5 ^ n + 4 ^ n := by
      classical
      have : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ¬(10 ∣ ∏ a, to_nat_digit (s a))} =
        Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0 ∨ to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0} := by
        apply Fintype.card_congr
        exact Equiv.subtypeEquiv _ (by
          intro s
          simp only [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd]
          push_neg
          rw [Nat.coprime_mul_iff_left]
          simp [Nat.coprime_comm]
          aesop)
      rw [← this]
      have : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0 ∨ to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0} =
        Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // (∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0) ∨ (∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0)} := by
        apply Fintype.card_congr
        exact Equiv.subtypeEquiv _ (by
          intro s
          simp only [forall_or, forall_and_distrib_left]
          tauto)
      rw [← this]
      rw [Fintype.card_subtype_union]
      · simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_subtype_compl, Fintype.card_fin,
          Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib]
        have h₂ : Fintype.card {d : Digit // to_nat_digit d % 2 ≠ 0} = 5 := by
          decide
        have h₃ : Fintype.card {d : Digit // to_nat_digit d % 5 ≠ 0} = 8 := by
          decide
        have h₄ : Fintype.card {d : Digit // to_nat_digit d % 2 ≠ 0 ∧ to_nat_digit d % 5 ≠ 0} = 4 := by
          decide
        simp [h₂, h₃, h₄, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib]
      · apply Set.InjOn.mono
        · intro x hx
          simp_all
        · intro x hx
          simp_all
    rw [h₁]
    ring
  · positivity

by
  simp only [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, to_nat_digit, solution]
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply_of_finite]
  · rw [Finset.card_filter]
    have h₁ : ∀ s : DigitSeq n, (∏ a, (s a + 1)) % 10 = 0 ↔ (∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0) ∧ (∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0) := by
      intro s
      constructor
      · intro h
        refine' ⟨_, _⟩
        · contrapose! h
          simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.prod_mod]
          omega
        · contrapose! h
          simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.prod_mod]
          omega
      · rintro ⟨⟨a, ha⟩, ⟨b, hb⟩⟩
        simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.prod_mod]
        omega
    simp_rw [h₁]
    have h₂ : Fintype.card (DigitSeq n) = 9 ^ n := by
      simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_fin]
    have h₃ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0} = 5 ^ n := by
      apply Fintype.card_congr
      refine' Equiv.piCongrRight fun _ => ⟨_, _⟩
      · intro d
        simp [Fin.val_lt]
        omega
      · intro x
        use x - 1
        simp [Fin.val_lt]
        omega
    have h₄ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0} = 8 ^ n := by
      apply Fintype.card_congr
      refine' Equiv.piCongrRight fun _ => ⟨_, _⟩
      · intro d
        simp [Fin.val_lt]
        omega
      · intro x
        use x - 1
        simp [Fin.val_lt]
        omega
    have h₅ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | (¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0) ∧ (¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0)} = 4 ^ n := by
      apply Fintype.card_congr
      refine' Equiv.piCongrRight fun _ => ⟨_, _⟩
      · intro d
        simp [Fin.val_lt]
        omega
      · intro x
        use x - 1
        simp [Fin.val_lt]
        omega
    field_simp [h₂, h₃, h₄, h₅]
    ring
  · apply_instance

by
  rw [solution]
  simp only [good_seqs, is_good_seq, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply_of_finite]
  · rw [PMF.uniformOfFintype_apply]
    norm_num
    have h₁ : Fintype.card (DigitSeq n) = 9 ^ n := by
      simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_fin]
    have h₂ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ¬10 ∣ ∏ a, to_nat_digit (s a)} =
      8 ^ n + 5 ^ n - 4 ^ n := by
      -- Count sequences missing factor 2 or 5
      have A : {s : DigitSeq n | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0} = {s | ∀ a, s a ∈ ({0, 2, 4, 6, 8} : Set Digit)} := by
        ext s; simp [to_nat_digit, Nat.succ_ne_zero]
        constructor <;> intro h <;> intro a <;> specialize h a <;> omega
      have B : {s : DigitSeq n | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0} = {s | ∀ a, s a ∈ ({0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8} : Set Digit)} := by
        ext s; simp [to_nat_digit]
        constructor <;> intro h <;> intro a <;> specialize h a <;> omega
      have AB : {s : DigitSeq n | (∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0) ∧ (∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0)} =
        {s | ∀ a, s a ∈ ({0, 2, 4, 6, 8} ∩ {0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8} : Set Digit)} := by
        ext s; simp [Set.mem_inter]
      simp [A, B, AB]
      rw [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_pi]
      norm_num
    rw [← h₁, ← h₂]
    field_simp
    ring
  · exact Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_mem_finset _) (by simp)

by
  simp [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, to_nat_digit, solution]
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply, PMF.uniformOfFintype_apply]
  norm_num
  apply Eq.symm
  rw [Finset.card_filter]
  have h₁ : ∀ s : DigitSeq n, (∏ a, (s a + 1)) % 10 = 0 ↔ (∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0) ∧ (∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0) := by
    intro s
    constructor
    · intro h
      have h₂ : 2 ∣ ∏ a, (s a + 1) := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by omega)
      have h₃ : 5 ∣ ∏ a, (s a + 1) := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by omega)
      exact ⟨Finset.prod_dvd_of_exists_dvd h₂, Finset.prod_dvd_of_exists_dvd h₃⟩
    · rintro ⟨⟨a, ha⟩, ⟨b, hb⟩⟩
      have h₂ : 2 ∣ (s a + 1) := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero ha
      have h₃ : 5 ∣ (s b + 1) := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero hb
      have h₄ : 10 ∣ (s a + 1) * (s b + 1) := by
        rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero]
        have h₅ : (s a + 1) * (s b + 1) % 10 = 0 := by
          have h₆ : (s a + 1) % 2 = 0 := Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd h₂
          have h₇ : (s b + 1) % 5 = 0 := Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd h₃
          omega
        exact h₅
      have h₅ : 10 ∣ ∏ a, (s a + 1) := by
        apply Nat.dvd_trans h₄
        apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left
        apply Finset.prod_dvd_prod_of_subset
        intro x hx
        simp_all
      exact Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd h₅
  simp_rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0 ∧ ∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0} =
    Fintype.card (DigitSeq n) - Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ∀ a, (s a + 1) % 2 ≠ 0} -
    Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ∀ a, (s a + 1) % 5 ≠ 0} +
    Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // (∀ a, (s a + 1) % 2 ≠ 0) ∧ (∀ a, (s a + 1) % 5 ≠ 0)} := by
    apply Nat.add_sub_add_sub_cancel
    apply Fintype.card_compl_inter
  rw [h₂]
  simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_fin]
  norm_num

by
  simp only [good_seqs, is_good_seq, unifDistN, PMF.toOuterMeasure, PMF.uniformOfFintype,
    Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  rw [PMF.probabilityOfSet_eq_card_div_card]
  · field_simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero]
    rw [← Nat.cast_inj]
    norm_num
    apply Eq.symm
    rw [Nat.card_filter_of_subtype, Nat.card_fin]
    congr
    ext s
    simp only [is_good_seq, to_nat_digit, Fin.prod_univ_succ, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero,
      Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd]
    have h₁ : (∏ i : Fin n, (s i + 1)) % 10 = 0 ↔
      ((∏ i : Fin n, (s i + 1)) % 2 = 0 ∧ (∏ i : Fin n, (s i + 1)) % 5 = 0) := by
      omega
    rw [h₁]
    have h₂ : (∏ i : Fin n, (s i + 1)) % 2 = 0 ↔ ∃ i, (s i + 1) % 2 = 0 := by
      simp [Finset.prod_eq_zero_iff, Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd]
    have h₃ : (∏ i : Fin n, (s i + 1)) % 5 = 0 ↔ ∃ i, (s i + 1) % 5 = 0 := by
      simp [Finset.prod_eq_zero_iff, Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd]
    rw [h₂, h₃]
    push_neg
    simp only [not_exists, not_and, not_or]
    have h₄ : ∀ i, (s i + 1) % 2 ≠ 0 ↔ s i + 1 ∈ ({1, 3, 5, 7, 9} : Finset ℕ) := by
      intro i
      have : s i + 1 ≤ 9 := by
        exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Fin.is_lt _)
      interval_cases (s i + 1) <;> simp_all
    have h₅ : ∀ i, (s i + 1) % 5 ≠ 0 ↔ s i + 1 ∈ ({1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9} : Finset ℕ) := by
      intro i
      have : s i + 1 ≤ 9 := by
        exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Fin.is_lt _)
      interval_cases (s i + 1) <;> simp_all
    simp_rw [h₄, h₅]
    have h₆ : {1, 3, 5, 7, 9} ∩ {1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9} = {1, 3, 7, 9} := by
      ext x
      constructor <;> intro hx <;> simp_all
    simp [h₆]
    congr
    ext
    simp
  · exact Finset.univ_nonempty

by
  simp only [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, to_nat_digit]
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply, PMF.uniformOfFintype_apply]
  norm_num
  apply Eq.symm
  rw [Finset.card_filter]
  congr
  ext s
  simp only [Finset.mem_univ, true_and, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, Finset.card_univ,
    Fintype.card_fun, Fintype.card_fin, Nat.cast_ofNat]
  norm_num
  have h₁ : (∏ a : Fin n, (s a + 1)) % 10 = 0 ↔ (∃ i, (s i + 1) % 2 = 0) ∧ (∃ i, (s i + 1) % 5 = 0) := by
    constructor
    · intro h
      have h₂ : 2 ∣ ∏ a : Fin n, (s a + 1) := by
        exact Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by omega)
      have h₃ : 5 ∣ ∏ a : Fin n, (s a + 1) := by
        exact Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by omega)
      exact ⟨Finset.prod_dvd_of_mem (by simpa using h₂), Finset.prod_dvd_of_mem (by simpa using h₃)⟩
    · rintro ⟨⟨i, hi⟩, ⟨j, hj⟩⟩
      have h₂ : 2 ∣ ∏ a : Fin n, (s a + 1) := by
        apply Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem
        simpa using hi
      have h₃ : 5 ∣ ∏ a : Fin n, (s a + 1) := by
        apply Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem
        simpa using hj
      omega
  simp_rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ¬∃ i, (s i + 1) % 2 = 0} = 5 ^ n := by
    apply Fintype.card_subtype_eq
    intro s
    simp only [not_exists, not_and_or, not_not]
    have : (∀ i, (s i + 1) % 2 ≠ 0) ↔ ∀ i, s i ∈ ({0, 2, 4, 6, 8} : Finset (Fin 9)) := by
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, Fin.val_eq_zero, Nat.succ_ne_zero,
        Nat.zero_add, Nat.add_succ, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt, Nat.succ_pos', Nat.zero_lt_succ]
      constructor
      · intro h i
        have : s i + 1 ∈ ({1, 3, 5, 7, 9} : Finset ℕ) := by
          have : (s i + 1) % 2 ≠ 0 := h i
          have : s i + 1 ≤ 9 := by
            exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Fin.is_lt _)
          interval_cases (s i + 1) <;> simp_all
        simpa using this
      · intro h i
        have : s i ∈ ({0, 2, 4, 6, 8} : Finset (Fin 9)) := h i
        interval_cases s i <;> simp_all
    simp_rw [this]
    simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_fin]
  have h₃ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // ¬∃ i, (s i + 1) % 5 = 0} = 8 ^ n := by
    apply Fintype.card_subtype_eq
    intro s
    simp only [not_exists, not_and_or, not_not]
    have : (∀ i, (s i + 1) % 5 ≠ 0) ↔ ∀ i, s i ∈ ({0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8} : Finset (Fin 9)) := by
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, Fin.val_eq_zero, Nat.succ_ne_zero,
        Nat.zero_add, Nat.add_succ, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt, Nat.succ_pos', Nat.zero_lt_succ]
      constructor
      · intro h i
        have : s i + 1 ∈ ({1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9} : Finset ℕ) := by
          have : (s i + 1) % 5 ≠ 0 := h i
          have : s i + 1 ≤ 9 := by
            exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Fin.is_lt _)
          interval_cases (s i + 1) <;> simp_all
        simpa using this
      · intro h i
        have : s i ∈ ({0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8} : Finset (Fin 9)) := h i
        interval_cases s i <;> simp_all
    simp_rw [this]
    simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_fin]
  have h₄ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n // (¬∃ i, (s i + 1) % 2 = 0) ∧ (¬∃ i, (s i + 1) % 5 = 0)} = 4 ^ n := by
    apply Fintype.card_subtype_eq
    intro s
    simp only [not_exists, not_and_or, not_not]
    have : (∀ i, (s i + 1) % 2 ≠ 0 ∧ (s i + 1) % 5 ≠ 0) ↔ ∀ i, s i ∈ ({0, 2, 6, 8} : Finset (Fin 9)) := by
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, Fin.val_eq_zero, Nat.succ_ne_zero,
        Nat.zero_add, Nat.add_succ, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt, Nat.succ_pos', Nat.zero_lt_succ]
      constructor
      · intro h i
        have : s i + 1 ∈ ({1, 3, 7, 9} : Finset ℕ) := by
          have : (s i + 1) % 2 ≠ 0 := (h i).1
          have : (s i + 1) % 5 ≠ 0 := (h i).2
          have : s i + 1 ≤ 9 := by
            exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Fin.is_lt _)
          interval_cases (s i + 1) <;> simp_all
        simpa using this
      · intro h i
        have : s i ∈ ({0, 2, 6, 8} : Finset (Fin 9)) := h i
        interval_cases s i <;> simp_all
    simp_rw [this]
    simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_fin]
  simp_all [Nat.cast_pow]
  <;> field_simp

  simp only [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, to_nat_digit]
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_set_eq]
  · simp [PMF.uniformOfFintype_apply]
    rw [Finset.card_filter]
    have : ∀ s : DigitSeq n, (10 ∣ ∏a, (s a + 1)) ↔ (∃ a, s a = 0) ∧ (∃ a, s a = 4) := by
      intro s
      constructor
      · intro h
        have h₁ : (2 : ℕ) ∣ ∏a, (s a + 1) := Nat.dvd_trans (by norm_num) h
        have h₂ : (5 : ℕ) ∣ ∏a, (s a + 1) := Nat.dvd_trans (by norm_num) h
        refine' ⟨_, _⟩
        · contrapose! h₁
          simp_all [Nat.Prime.dvd_prod, Nat.succ_pos]
          intro i
          have : s i + 1 ∈ ({1, 3, 5, 7, 9} : Finset ℕ) := by
            have : s i ∈ Finset.univ := Finset.mem_univ _
            simp_all [Fin.val_lt]
          simp_all [Nat.Prime.dvd_mul, Nat.succ_pos]
        · contrapose! h₂
          simp_all [Nat.Prime.dvd_prod, Nat.succ_pos]
          intro i
          have : s i + 1 ∈ ({1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9} : Finset ℕ) := by
            have : s i ∈ Finset.univ := Finset.mem_univ _
            simp_all [Fin.val_lt]
          simp_all [Nat.Prime.dvd_mul, Nat.succ_pos]
      · rintro ⟨⟨a, ha⟩, ⟨b, hb⟩⟩
        rw [← Nat.dvd_lcm, Nat.lcm_comm]
        apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
        simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod]
    simp_all only [this]
    rw [Finset.card_compl, Finset.card_univ]
    simp [Fintype.card_fun]
    ring
  · exact Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_univ _) _

  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply_of_finite]
  · rw [Finset.card_filter]
    have h₁ : ∀ s : DigitSeq n, (∏ a, (s a + 1)) % 10 = 0 ↔ (∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0) ∧ (∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0) := by
      intro s
      constructor
      · intro h
        refine' ⟨_, _⟩
        · contrapose! h
          simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.ModEq]
          omega
        · contrapose! h
          simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.ModEq]
          omega
      · rintro ⟨⟨a, ha⟩, ⟨b, hb⟩⟩
        simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.ModEq]
        omega
    simp_rw [h₁]
    simp [Finset.filter, Finset.card]
    have h₂ : Fintype.card (DigitSeq n) = 9 ^ n := by
      simp [DigitSeq, Fintype.card_pi, Digit]
    rw [h₂]
    have h₃ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0} = 5 ^ n := by
      apply Eq.symm
      calc
        Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ∀ a, (s a + 1) % 2 ≠ 0}
          = Fintype.card (Fin n → {d : Digit | (d + 1) % 2 ≠ 0}) := by
            apply Fintype.card_congr
            exact Equiv.subtypeEquiv (Equiv.refl _) fun s ↦ by
              simp [Function.funext_iff]
        _ = 5 ^ n := by
          have : Fintype.card {d : Digit | (d + 1) % 2 ≠ 0} = 5 := by
            decide
          simp [this, Fintype.card_pi]
    have h₄ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0} = 8 ^ n := by
      apply Eq.symm
      calc
        Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ∀ a, (s a + 1) % 5 ≠ 0}
          = Fintype.card (Fin n → {d : Digit | (d + 1) % 5 ≠ 0}) := by
            apply Fintype.card_congr
            exact Equiv.subtypeEquiv (Equiv.refl _) fun s ↦ by
              simp [Function.funext_iff]
        _ = 8 ^ n := by
          have : Fintype.card {d : Digit | (d + 1) % 5 ≠ 0} = 8 := by
            decide
          simp [this, Fintype.card_pi]
    have h₅ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | (¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0) ∨ (¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0)} =
      5 ^ n + 8 ^ n - 4 ^ n := by
      have : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | (¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 2 = 0) ∧ (¬∃ a, (s a + 1) % 5 = 0)} = 4 ^ n := by
        apply Eq.symm
        calc
          Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ∀ a, (s a + 1) % 2 ≠ 0 ∧ (s a + 1) % 5 ≠ 0}
            = Fintype.card (Fin n → {d : Digit | (d + 1) % 2 ≠ 0 ∧ (d + 1) % 5 ≠ 0}) := by
              apply Fintype.card_congr
              exact Equiv.subtypeEquiv (Equiv.refl _) fun s ↦ by
                simp [Function.funext_iff]
            _ = 4 ^ n := by
              have : Fintype.card {d : Digit | (d + 1) % 2 ≠ 0 ∧ (d + 1) % 5 ≠ 0} = 4 := by
                decide
              simp [this, Fintype.card_pi]
      rw [Finset.card_union]
      · omega
      · ext s
        simp
    rw [← Nat.cast_inj]
    push_cast
    field_simp
    ring
  · exact Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_mem_finset _) (by simp)

    1 - (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure {s | ¬(10 ∣ ∏ a, to_nat_digit (s a))} := by

    {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0} ∪ {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0} := by
    ext s
    simp only [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd, not_forall, not_exists,
      not_and, exists_prop, Prod.exists, Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.prod_univ_zero]
    constructor
    · intro h
      by_contra! h'
      apply h
      exact Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by
        have h₃ : (∏ a, to_nat_digit (s a)) % 2 = 0 := by
          apply Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd
          apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
          intro a
          have h₄ : to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 = 0 ∨ to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 = 0 := by
            apply h'
            tauto
          cases' h₄ with h₄ h₄ <;> simp_all
        have h₃' : (∏ a, to_nat_digit (s a)) % 5 = 0 := by
          apply Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd
          apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
          intro a
          have h₄ : to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 = 0 ∨ to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 = 0 := by
            apply h'
            tauto
          cases' h₄ with h₄ h₄ <;> simp_all
        omega)
    · intro h
      cases' h with h h <;> intro hh <;> simp_all
  rw [h₂]
  have h₃ : (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure ({s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0} ∪
    {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0}) =
    (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0} +
    (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0} -
    (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure ({s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0} ∩
    {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0}) := by
    rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_union]
  rw [h₃]
  have h₄ : (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0} = (5 / 9) ^ n := by
    simp [unifDistN, PMF.uniformOfFintype, PMF.toOuterMeasure_singleton]

  have h₅ : (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0} = (8 / 9) ^ n := by
    simp [unifDistN, PMF.uniformOfFintype, PMF.toOuterMeasure_singleton]
    rfl
  have h₆ : (unifDistN n).toOuterMeasure ({s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 2 ≠ 0} ∩
    {s | ∀ a, to_nat_digit (s a) % 5 ≠ 0}) = (4 / 9) ^ n := by
    simp [unifDistN, PMF.uniformOfFintype, PMF.toOuterMeasure_singleton]
    rfl
  rw [h₄, h₅, h₆]

by
  rw [solution]
  simp only [good_seqs, is_good_seq, unifDistN, PMF.toOuterMeasure]
  rw [PMF.probability_of_set_eq_card_div_card]
  swap
  · infer_instance
  · rfl
  classical
  rw [Nat.card_fin]
  norm_num
  have h₁ : (Finset.univ : Finset (DigitSeq n)).card = 9 ^ n := by
    simp [Nat.card_fin, Fintype.card_fun]
  rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : (Finset.filter (fun s ↦ 10 ∣ ∏a, to_nat_digit (s a)) Finset.univ).card =
      9 ^ n - 8 ^ n - 5 ^ n + 4 ^ n := by
    have : ∀ s : DigitSeq n, (10 ∣ ∏a, to_nat_digit (s a)) ↔
        (∃ i, to_nat_digit (s i) = 2 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 4 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 6 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 8) ∧
        (∃ i, to_nat_digit (s i) = 5) := by
      intro s
      constructor
      · intro h
        have h₁ : 2 ∣ ∏a, to_nat_digit (s a) := Nat.dvd_trans (by decide) h
        have h₂ : 5 ∣ ∏a, to_nat_digit (s a) := Nat.dvd_trans (by decide) h
        constructor
        · contrapose! h₁
          simp_all [Nat.Prime.dvd_prod]
          <;> omega
        · contrapose! h₂
          simp_all [Nat.Prime.dvd_prod]
          <;> omega
      · rintro ⟨⟨i, hi⟩, ⟨j, hj⟩⟩
        have h₁ : 2 ∣ to_nat_digit (s i) := by
          cases' hi with h h <;> cases' h with h h <;> subst_vars <;> decide
        have h₂ : 5 ∣ to_nat_digit (s j) := by
          subst_vars
          decide
        exact Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (Nat.dvd_trans h₁ (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)) _
    rw [this]
    simp only [Finset.card_filter, Finset.mem_univ, forall_true_left]
    rw [Finset.card_compl, Finset.card_compl]
    simp only [Finset.card_univ, Nat.card_fin, Fintype.card_fun]
    norm_num
    have A : (Finset.filter (fun s ↦ ¬∃ i, to_nat_digit (s i) = 2 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 4 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 6 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 8) Finset.univ).card = 5 ^ n := by
      apply Eq.symm
      rw [Finset.card_filter]
      congr
      ext s
      simp only [Finset.mem_univ, forall_true_left, not_exists, not_or]
      have : ∀ d : Digit, to_nat_digit d ∈ [1, 3, 5, 7, 9] ↔
          ¬(to_nat_digit d = 2 ∨ to_nat_digit d = 4 ∨ to_nat_digit d = 6 ∨ to_nat_digit d = 8) := by
        intro d
        simp only [to_nat_digit, Fin.val_add_one, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
        have : (d : ℕ) < 9 := Fin.is_lt d
        interval_cases (d : ℕ) <;> simp_all
      simp_all [Finset.mem_univ]
      rw [Fintype.card_fun]
      norm_num
    have B : (Finset.filter (fun s ↦ ¬∃ i, to_nat_digit (s i) = 5) Finset.univ).card = 8 ^ n := by
      apply Eq.symm
      rw [Finset.card_filter]
      congr
      ext s
      simp only [Finset.mem_univ, forall_true_left, not_exists]
      have : ∀ d : Digit, to_nat_digit d ≠ 5 ↔ (d : ℕ) + 1 ≠ 5 := by
        intro d
        simp only [to_nat_digit]
      simp_all [Finset.mem_univ]
      rw [Fintype.card_fun]
      norm_num
    have C : (Finset.filter (fun s ↦ (¬∃ i, to_nat_digit (s i) = 2 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 4 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 6 ∨ to_nat_digit (s i) = 8) ∧
        ¬∃ i, to_nat_digit (s i) = 5) Finset.univ).card = 4 ^ n := by
      apply Eq.symm
      rw [Finset.card_filter]
      congr
      ext s
      simp only [Finset.mem_univ, forall_true_left, not_exists, not_or]
      have : ∀ d : Digit, to_nat_digit d ∈ [1, 3, 7, 9] ↔
          ¬(to_nat_digit d = 2 ∨ to_nat_digit d = 4 ∨ to_nat_digit d = 6 ∨ to_nat_digit d = 8) ∧ to_nat_digit d ≠ 5 := by
        intro d
        simp only [to_nat_digit, Fin.val_add_one, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
        have : (d : ℕ) < 9 := Fin.is_lt d
        interval_cases (d : ℕ) <;> simp_all
      simp_all [Finset.mem_univ]
      rw [Fintype.card_fun]
      norm_num
    rw [A, B, C]
    ring
  rw [h₂]
  field_simp [h₁]
  ring

  have h₂ : Fintype.card {s : DigitSeq n | ¬10 ∣ ∏a, (s a + 1)} =

    have A : {s : DigitSeq n | ∀ a, ¬2 ∣ (s a + 1)} = {s | ∀ a, s a ∈ ({0, 2, 4, 6, 8} : Finset Digit)} := by
      ext s; simp [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.add_mod]; constructor <;> intro h <;>
        funext a <;> have := h a <;> omega
    have B : {s : DigitSeq n | ∀ a, ¬5 ∣ (s a + 1)} = {s | ∀ a, s a ∈ ({0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8} : Finset Digit)} := by
      ext s; simp [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.add_mod]; constructor <;> intro h <;>

      Fintype.card {s | ¬10 ∣ ∏a, (s a + 1)}
        = Fintype.card ({s | ∀ a, ¬2 ∣ (s a + 1)} ∪ {s | ∀ a, ¬5 ∣ (s a + 1)}) := by
          ext s; simp [Nat.dvd_mul, Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one, Nat.gcd_mul_left, Nat.gcd_mul_right]
          constructor <;> intro h <;>
            by_cases h2 : ∀ a, ¬2 ∣ (s a + 1) <;>
            by_cases h5 : ∀ a, ¬5 ∣ (s a + 1) <;>
            simp_all [Nat.dvd_mul, Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one] <;>
            omega
      _ = Fintype.card {s | ∀ a, ¬2 ∣ (s a + 1)} + Fintype.card {s | ∀ a, ¬5 ∣ (s a + 1)} -
          Fintype.card ({s | ∀ a, ¬2 ∣ (s a + 1)} ∩ {s | ∀ a, ¬5 ∣ (s a + 1)}) := by
            rw [Fintype.card_union]
      _ = 5 ^ n + 8 ^ n - 4 ^ n := by
        rw [A, B, AB]
        simp [Fintype.card_pi, Fintype.card_fin, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem,
          Finset.card_singleton, Finset.card_empty]
        norm_num
      _ = 8 ^ n + 5 ^ n - 4 ^ n := by ring
  rw [← Nat.sub_sub, ← Nat.cast_sub, ← Nat.cast_add, ← Nat.cast_pow]
  all_goals norm_num
  all_goals linarith

by
  simp [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, to_nat_digit, solution]
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply]
  simp [PMF.uniformOfFintype_apply]
  norm_num
  <;> field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero]
  <;> ring

by
  simp [unifDistN, good_seqs, is_good_seq, to_nat_digit, solution]
  rw [PMF.toOuterMeasure_apply_of_finite]
  · simp [Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fun, Fintype.card_fin]
    norm_num
    rw [← Nat.cast_inj (R := ℚ)]
    norm_num
    ring
  · exact Set.Finite.subset (Set.finite_univ _) (fun _ ↦ by simp)
